core_mechanism: Gauging of a continuous symmetry group: promoting the isometry group of a curved target (scalar) manifold from a global to a local symmetry by minimally coupling it to connection/gauge fields, with all interaction terms and field transformation laws uniquely fixed by requiring invariance under (closure of) an overarching symmetry algebra
brief_reason: The abstract's method is to construct the full Lagrangian and transformation rules by gauging the R-symmetry group and a subgroup K of the isometries of the scalar manifold, i.e. turning global isometries of a target manifold into a local symmetry with couplings pinned down by the supersymmetry algebra.
